site.name: Lokesh
site.title: Website Developer • Digital Marketer • Security Audit Support
site.tagline: I build clean, fast and trustworthy digital experiences for local businesses and growing brands.
site.description: Lokesh provides website development, digital marketing support, landing pages, business websites, website refresh work, basic security audit support, SEO setup, content updates and maintenance.

seo.title: Lokesh | Web Development, Digital Marketing & Security Audit Support
seo.description: Professional profile website for Lokesh offering business websites, landing pages, digital marketing support, SEO setup and basic security audit support.
seo.keywords: Lokesh, website development, digital marketing, security audit, SEO, landing page, portfolio website

about.heading: Professional profile website for modern business growth
about.body: I help businesses create a strong online presence with fast websites, practical marketing support and trustworthy digital improvements. My focus is clear communication, clean execution and solutions that are realistic to deliver.

services.title: Business Website Development
services.description: Modern responsive websites for shops, cafes, furniture stores, service brands and local businesses.

services.title: Landing Page Design
services.description: High-converting single-page websites for promotions, campaigns and lead generation.

services.title: Website Redesign
services.description: Improve old websites with cleaner UI, better structure and mobile-friendly layouts.

services.title: SEO Setup
services.description: Meta tags, schema basics, page structure, speed-friendly setup and search visibility improvements.

services.title: Digital Marketing Support
services.description: Basic content planning, campaign page setup, CTA optimization and lead capture structure.

services.title: Content Update & Maintenance
services.description: Ongoing support for text changes, banners, service updates, image replacement and fixes.

services.title: Basic Security Audit Support
services.description: Basic website checks for hygiene issues, visible risks and improvement suggestions.

services.title: WhatsApp Lead Integration
services.description: Connect website actions to WhatsApp for faster inquiries and simpler customer communication.

projects.name: Cafe Demo Website
projects.summary: Animated landing page with menu highlights, WhatsApp CTA and premium visuals.

projects.name: Furniture Store Profile
projects.summary: Brand-style homepage for product showcase, trust building and inquiry generation.

projects.name: Service Landing Page
projects.summary: Compact conversion-focused page built for phone inquiries and quick action.

process.title: Requirement Discussion
process.text: Understand business type, pages, goals and service scope.

process.title: Design & Content Setup
process.text: Prepare structure, theme, sections and CTA flow.

process.title: Build & Optimize
process.text: Develop fast pages with animation, SEO basics and mobile support.

process.title: Launch & Support
process.text: Connect forms, test behavior and provide update-ready structure.

contact.heading: Let’s build something professional
contact.subheading: Tell me what service you need and I’ll get back to you.
